title: Lucid Job Request
description: A job submission request that binds a quote to a specific input for execution. The job_hash provides a cryptographic commitment to the entire request.

job_id.description: Unique identifier for this job. Used for status queries and deduplication.

model_id.description: Model passport ID or HuggingFace model ID. MUST match quote.model_id.

offer_id.description: Compute offer passport ID. MUST match quote.offer_id.

compute_offer_passport_id.description: On-chain ComputeOfferPassport ID (Solana PDA). Links execution to on-chain registry for verifiable matching. If provided, MUST match quote.compute_offer_passport_id.

quote.description: The quote that authorizes this execution. Signature and expiration are validated.

input.description: Input payload for the model execution

messages.description: Chat messages for chat completion models

images.description: Base64 encoded images or URLs for multimodal models

audio.description: Base64 encoded audio or URL for audio models

input_ref.description: Optional URI to encrypted input blob in S3/IPFS (for enterprise audit trail). If provided, 'input' may be omitted.

max_tokens.description: Maximum tokens to generate. MUST be <= quote.max_output_tokens.

stream.description: Enable streaming response (not applicable for job-based execution)

publish_ipfs.description: Publish output to IPFS after S3 storage

store_input.description: Store input blob for audit trail (creates input_ref in receipt)

trace_id.description: Optional trace ID for distributed tracing

callback_url.description: Optional webhook URL to POST result when job completes

job_hash.description: SHA256 hash of canonical JSON of: { job_id, model_id, quote_hash, input_hash }. Provides cryptographic commitment to the request.
